Meaning.Vi: kinh khủng, khủng khiếp, rất xấu
Meaning.En: extremely bad or unpleasant; causing fear or distress
Meaning.Example: The weather was terrible, with heavy rain and strong winds.

Situation.Vi: Mô tả tình huống khó chịu, nguy hiểm hoặc không dễ chịu về mặt thể chất/tinh thần.
Situation.En: Describing a situation that is very unpleasant, dangerous, or distressing.

Situation.Vi: Dùng để nhấn mạnh mức độ tiêu cực (ví dụ: terrible headache).
Situation.En: Used to emphasize a high degree of negativity (e.g., a terrible headache).

Meaning.Vi: không thể chịu nổi, quá mức (dùng trong văn nói)
Meaning.En: unbearable; too much to endure (used informally for emphasis)
Meaning.Example: The traffic was terrible this morning—I was over an hour late.

Situation.Vi: Phản ứng cảm xúc khi gặp điều gì quá mức (ví dụ: quá đông, quá ồn).
Situation.En: Expressing exasperation or frustration at something overwhelming (e.g., too crowded, too noisy).
